_publications._publicationTitle: FAP expression as a marker of malignant transformation enabling in vivo characterization in peripheral nerve sheath tumors: a multimodal and translational study.

_contextSnippet: MPNSTs showed moderate to strong FAP expression on most tumor cells and partly also in surrounding stromal cells...MPNSTs displayed significantly higher FAP expression in the tumor as well as stroma compartment than neurofibromas
details: Showed strong FAP expression in MPNSTs with moderate to strong expression on most tumor cells and surrounding stromal cells, while neurofibromas showed absent to low FAP expression
